segments.text: Again and again, iron resources completely saturated
segments.original_text: 再びと再びそして鉄の資源も十分に潤った状態

segments.text: Yeah, it's almost too much at this point
segments.original_text: そうですねちょっとありすぎなぐらいの

segments.text: Yeah, or we're at a point where iron isn't even needed
segments.original_text: そうですねむしろ鉄がいらないかというところですが
その後まるでピクミンの色調整をするかのように

full_text: Again and again, iron resources completely saturated Yeah, it's almost too much at this point Yeah, or we're at a point where iron isn't even needed Then, like adjusting Pikmin colors it's reached that with a bair
